title: Shadows in an Empty Room
original_title: Una Magnum Special per Tony Saitta
overview: After his younger sister is poisoned, a tough Ottawa cop embarks on a violent journey through Montreal to find her killer, which turns into a whirlpool of revenge and betrayal.
